conclusion: All 716 catalog rows, 569 links, 10 audited pairs, and 650 scale packet scheduler allocations are accounted at the freeze.
sampling_unit: catalog row, link, audited pair, and scheduler allocation
uncertainty_covariance: Scheduler states include failed, cancelled, pending, and running records; MaxRSS was unavailable and not imputed.
forbidden_inference: Do not equate submitted allocations with independent biological observations.

conclusion: Two completed H1/H2 assembly-derived individual estimates are 0.0021472198306856562 and 0.004604184795871289 per callable base, a 2.144254-fold observed range.
sampling_unit: one phased H1/H2 pair from one individual
uncertainty_covariance: Both estimates are method-specific; their PSMC outputs share the same pair and are non-independent.
forbidden_inference: Do not call this a validated vertebrate distribution or a species population mean.

conclusion: P04 remains the sole retained assembly-derived quantitative result, with raw validation explicitly pending.
uncertainty_covariance: Assembly bootstrap concerns PSMC theta rather than raw-read measurement error; exact CLR reads remain unacquired.
forbidden_inference: Do not describe P04 as independently read-validated or as a population estimate.

conclusion: P07 meets the predeclared concrete haplotype-reconstruction-failure rule in both Illumina and HiFi and is preserved but excluded from quantitative synthesis.
sampling_unit: assembly SNP within exact-individual depth-qualified read evidence
observed_scope: Illumina lower bound 0.501223; HiFi lower bound 0.531662
uncertainty_covariance: Chemistries share the individual and reference and are informative but not fully independent.
forbidden_inference: Do not delete the artifact, average it with read estimates, or admit its pi/PSMC as validated biology.

conclusion: For the P07 DP10-80 common mask, concordant and union call sets bracket pi at 0.00035313709 and 0.00089988195 under the observed paired callers.
sampling_unit: shared H1 coordinate within the common depth mask
uncertainty_covariance: These are disagreement brackets, not complete biological confidence limits; caller failures are correlated.
forbidden_inference: Do not label the bracket endpoints true pi or convert disagreement bounds into proven error rates.

conclusion: The primary common mask retains 95.677% of inherited callable bases but 38.872% of inherited assembly differences; excluded-site density is 34.8067-fold higher.
uncertainty_covariance: Masking, mappability, collapse, and caller effects are entangled.
forbidden_inference: Do not assert every excluded assembly difference is false.

conclusion: P07 k-mer heterozygosity (0.00266527) near the inherited assembly pi but far above stringent mapped-read pi suggests strong representation/callability dependence.
sampling_unit: distinct read k-mer spectrum from one individual
uncertainty_covariance: Repeats, coverage bias, correlated k-mers, and shared molecular material are systematic uncertainty.
forbidden_inference: Do not select or average the k-mer value as truth or treat it as a population estimate.

conclusion: Both completed pairs have 64-interval unscaled PSMC trajectories and 200/200 finite block bootstraps centered on primary theta.
sampling_unit: block of the same pair-specific primary PSMCFA
uncertainty_covariance: Masked and callable bins remain in the block-bootstrap population; P07 is later invalidated by reads.
forbidden_inference: Do not count pi and PSMC as independent evidence or retain P07 demographic biology.

conclusion: Absolute time and effective-size values are bounded only by nine generic mutation-rate by generation-time sensitivity scenarios.
estimand: scenario-scaled PSMC time and effective size
sampling_unit: pair-specific PSMC interval under generic scenario
uncertainty_covariance: No scenario is species calibrated or preferred.
forbidden_inference: Do not quote one absolute history as a species estimate.

conclusion: The retained P04 unscaled trajectory has an early lambda maximum (2.874536) and a later broad low (minimum 0.492194), suggesting temporal structure for follow-up.
uncertainty_covariance: Single-individual PSMC resolution, assembly sensitivity, and generic scaling limit interpretation.
forbidden_inference: Do not name demographic events, dates, or population sizes from this shape.

conclusion: Six P07 CDS/fourfold/WS/SW partitions use an exact-native annotation with an equal sequence dictionary.
sampling_unit: callable annotated base in one P07 individual
uncertainty_covariance: The parent P07 quantitative result is invalidated by exact reads.
forbidden_inference: Do not use these partitions as validated diversity or gene-conversion evidence.

conclusion: P07 fourfold W/S and WS/SW partition differences are an audit signal only.
sampling_unit: annotated fourfold site in one assembly-derived pair
uncertainty_covariance: Mutation spectrum, polarization, callability, reconstruction failure, and non-independence are unresolved.
forbidden_inference: Do not call this gBGC, a conversion rate, or transmission bias.

conclusion: Species means, within-species distributions, contemporary Ne, and cross-species population relationships are not identifiable from one H1/H2 individual per completed pair.
sampling_unit: independent individual nested in a sampled population and species
uncertainty_covariance: No population replication or sampling frame exists.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize individual assembly estimates to populations or species.

conclusion: A validated vertebrate diversity range is not identifiable: of two completed assembly observations, P07 is invalidated and P04 is raw-validation pending.
uncertainty_covariance: Execution attrition and validation are nonrandom; missing estimates are not zeroes.
forbidden_inference: Do not report the 2.144254-fold assembly range as the vertebrate biological range.

conclusion: This pilot exposes assembly and callability sensitivity that a Lewontin-paradox analysis must control, but it does not test compression of diversity across vertebrates or its relationship to census size.
estimand: cross-species diversity range and diversity-census-size association
observed_scope: two assembly observations; zero fully validated admitted observations
uncertainty_covariance: Tiny, selected, non-population sample with one invalidated pair and one validation-pending pair.
forbidden_inference: Do not claim support for, resolution of, or refutation of Lewontin's paradox.

conclusion: No actual conforming VGP estimate exists in any of the four gene-conversion branches, which remain separate.
estimand: direct, population, historical, and non-allelic gene conversion
uncertainty_covariance: H1/H2 WS/SW annotation counts do not satisfy any branch estimand.
forbidden_inference: Do not merge branches or treat annotation partitions as conversion estimates.
